channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why HBO’s ‘Harry Potter’ Show Won’t Be ‘The Biggest Streaming Event’ In History
item.description: WB believes that the Harry Potter HBO show may be the biggest streaming event in the history of the medium. It might be close.

item.title: These Great American Innovators Won Fame — But Not Fortune — From Their Inventions
item.description: Our upcoming ranking of America’s 250 Greatest Innovators is aimed at those who were able to commercialize their innovations, but these less fortunate...

item.title: 400 Million Idle Gaming PCs Could Be The AI Era's Secret Weapon
item.description: Bitcoin miners pivoted their data centers to AI. But a less visible shift is happening from the bottom up, as crypto's GPU networks find a second life...

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Wednesday, February 11
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Russia Is Launching FPVs From Drone Motherships
item.description: Russian Gerbera long-range decoy/attack drones are now acting as motherships for small FPV quadcopters.

item.title: A starting point for the blog
item.description: The challenge of the library is the card catalog. If you don’t know what you’re looking for, it’s hard to find much of anything. The challenge of the ...

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...

item.title: Free agency
item.description: Unrestricted free choice is a myth. There are always boundaries and trade-offs. But being fully stuck is also a myth. We might not like the trade offs...

item.title: Vessel size
item.description: “May your cup runneth over…” This begs the question: how big a cup? The logistics of vessel size determine how much money we need to raise, how big a ...

item.title: Voluntary stories
item.description: The narrative we run in our head is a choice. It might or might not be based on objective reality and verified history. Doesn’t matter, it’s still a c...
